title: Person
description: Schema for Person from CMS Marketplace API

dob.description: A person's date of birth (YYYY-MM-DD) required if age not provided

is_pregnant.description: Indicates whether the individual is pregnant or not. If this is true and `pregnant_with` is not provided, `pregnant_with` is assumed to be 1.

pregnant_with.description: The number of expected children from a pregnancy. If this value is > 0, `is_pregnant` is assumed to be true, even if specified otherwise.

last_tobacco_use_date.description: The last date of regular tobacco use (YYYY-MM-DD)

aptc_eligible.description: is the given person eligible for APTC
